utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes: selected_property (maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check if each is fully specified per item: 
- property: Includes selected property with details and price (name, location, type, size, features, listing_price) – fully specified.
- financing: Includes financing solution with terms (option, LTV, interest rate, term, arrangement fee, notes). This counts as specified, though rate is approximate, but terms are present.
- legal_services: Includes legal services with costs (package and cost), also includes property survey with cost and timeline – fully specified.
- moving_services: Includes moving arrangements with costs (service and estimated_cost, notes) – fully specified.
- setup_services: Includes utility and setup services (description and estimated_cost) – fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides complete cost breakdown with line items and total_estimated_cost – fully specified.
All 6 required items are present and adequately detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes the purchase property 'New Build', the financing option 'Traditional Mortgage', the legal package 'Basic Legal Package with Conveyancing' (matches 'Basic Legal Package'), and the survey 'Full Structural Survey'. For moving, it lists 'Standard Moving Service' (matches 'Standard Moving'), and for utilities/setup it provides a generic setup; there is no exact match in ground-truth utility_setup items, so we only map the items that have direct name matches.
